title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 30 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 30 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report June 30 2026
summary:
Main
Today, the iron ore market on the Dalian Commodity Exchange showed a volatile trading pattern,with contract I2609 eventually closing at 747 yuan/ton, up +0.61% compared with the previous trading session. Port spot prices rose by 0-3 yuan/ton from the previous day. Trader activity was moderate, while steel mill purchases remained largely needôbased; as of now, spot market transaction volumes have been average.
